body:
## Rationale

**Black metal / symphonic metal tier — next uncovered pair after Inferno/Hellhammer.**

GSC signal: `behemoth drummer` at pos 17 confirms black metal band-name queries are real intent. Frost and Daray are the two highest-TAM uncovered black metal drummers in the roster.

- **Frost** (Kjetil-Vidar Haraldstad) — Satyricon (1996–present) + 1349. Machine-precise blast beats, aggressive mid-paced grooves. Known for "K.I.N.G.", "Fuel for Hatred", "Mother North". Major figure in Norwegian black metal.
- **Daray** (Daray Czajka) — Dimmu Borgir (2005–present). Symphonic black metal precision — orchestral timing + blast beats. Known for "Abrahadabra", "Forces of the Northern Night", "Council of Wolves and Snakes".

Both confirmed in `extendedBios.js` (slugs: `frost`, `daray`). Both confirmed absent from `packages/frontend/data/licks/index.js`.

## Implementation

Follows the modular pattern from #1056. See any existing lick module for exact format (e.g. `packages/frontend/data/licks/inferno.js`).

**Files to create:**
- `packages/frontend/data/licks/frost.js` — 3 licks
- `packages/frontend/data/licks/daray.js` — 3 licks

**Files to update:**
- `packages/frontend/data/licks/index.js` — add 2 imports + 2 spreads
- `api/sitemap.js` — add lick hub entries for both drummers

**Lick ideas (verify YouTube IDs with --strict gate):**

Frost:
- `frost-fuel-for-hatred-blast` — Satyricon "Fuel for Hatred" - precision blast pattern
- `frost-king-mid-tempo-groove` — Satyricon "K.I.N.G." - signature groove
- `frost-mother-north-groove` — Satyricon "Mother North" - classic mid-paced feel

Daray:
- `daray-gateways-blast` — Dimmu Borgir "Gateways" - technical blasting
- `daray-progenies-double-bass` — Dimmu Borgir "Progenies of the Great Apocalypse" - double bass run
- `daray-council-of-wolves-groove` — Dimmu Borgir "Council of Wolves and Snakes" - groove section

## Quality gate
- ≥ 300 words per lick page (description + tab notation + technique breakdown)
- ≥ 3 internal links per lick page (→ drummer profile, → hub, → related technique)
- HowTo + VideoObject + MusicRecording + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD (matches existing lick schema)
- YouTube IDs verified via --strict gate (#984 pattern)
- Hub pages: CollectionPage + ItemList schema, linked from /licks index

## Estimated organic uplift
Serves `frost satyricon drummer`, `daray dimmu borgir drum kit`, `dimmu borgir drummer` query bucket. Compounds the active black metal band lane (sitemap + meta for bands.md). Adds ~6 lick pages + 2 hub pages = 8 net-new indexable pages.

## Verify
1. `grep frost packages/frontend/data/licks/index.js` returns the import + spread
2. `grep daray packages/frontend/data/licks/index.js` returns the import + spread
3. `/drummers/frost/licks` and `/drummers/daray/licks` return 200
4. Each lick page has HowTo + VideoObject JSON-LD in SSR response
5. Both hub slugs appear in `api/sitemap.js` lick entries

## Done
- [ ] `frost.js` + `daray.js` created with 3 licks each
- [ ] index.js updated with imports + spreads
- [ ] sitemap updated
- [ ] Hub pages render at /drummers/frost/licks and /drummers/daray/licks
title: SEO batch: signature licks — Frost (Satyricon/1349) + Daray (Dimmu Borgir) (~6 licks, 2 hubs)
